security.csp: default-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost http://127.0.0.1:* http://localhost:*; img-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost; media-src 'self' http://127.0.0.1:* https:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'
